questionHtml: Identify the initiation step of the reaction and its conditions.
markschemeHtml:
Br2 → 2Br•  [✔]

«sun»light/UV/hv
OR
high temperature  [✔]

 

Note: Do not penalize missing radical symbol on Br.

Accept “homolytic fission of bromine” for M1.

meta.title: Identify the initiation step of the reaction and its conditions.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.3.2—Radicals are produced by homolytic fission, e.g. of halogens, in the presence of ultraviolet (UV) light or heat. Explain, including with equations, the homolytic fission of halogens, known as the initiation step in a chain reaction.
